creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
The website indeed seems fine here but the distfile is unavailable (our own mirror does not count) :

=> jade-1.2.1.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.jclark.com/pub/jade/jade-1.2.1.tar.gz
jade-1.2.1.tar.gz                                     1066 kB  655 kBps    02s
=> jade_1.2.1-35.diff.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://dist.bsdlab.org/jade_1.2.1-35.diff.gz
fetch: http://dist.bsdlab.org/jade_1.2.1-35.diff.gz: Host does not resolve
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/jade_1.2.1-3
5.diff.gz
jade_1.2.1-35.diff.gz                                  220 kB  564 kBps    00s
===> Fetching all distfiles required by jade-1.2.1_11 for building
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for jade-1.2.1.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for jade_1.2.1-35.diff.gz.

So the port is still unfetchable.
